chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-800 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 05-12-2022 Ms. Shahida Ghani advocate for applicant along with applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh along with ASI Ghulam Shabir PS B-Section Nawabshah. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is a respectable person and works in PEPSI Company Hyderabad is being hounded by the police under the garb of his father’s alleged involvement in crime No.182/2022 under sections 4 / 8 of Sindh Mainpuri Gutka Act, 2019, PS B-Section Nawabshah. Learned A.P.G. submits that applicant would be dealt in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to him however action, if any, would be taken in accordance with law. Learned counsel for applicant is satisfied and criminal miscellaneous application is disposed of in above terms accordingly. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
